case_title: JOSEPH IMBELLONI VS. TIMOTHY HUBBARD et al

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF IMBELLONI, JOSEPH ON DEFENDANT HUBBARD, TIMOTHY
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBARD, TIMOTHY
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBARD, TIMOTHY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF IMBELLONI, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HUBBARD, TIMOTHY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 55 POLK ST. #402, S.F. CA. 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IMBELLONI, JOSEPH SERVED DEC-14-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBARD, TIMOTHY

RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBARD, TIMOTHY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF IMBELLONI, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT HUBBARD, TIMOTHY DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
